title: My Best Dividend Aristocrats For February 2023
text: NOBL fell 4.12% in December, which brings the Fund's return for the year to a loss of 6.5%. Thus far this month, through January 25th, the dividend aristocrat ETF is up 1.92% and starting the year on a bright note.

title: T. Rowe Price (TROW) Surpasses Q4 Earnings Estimates
text: T. Rowe (TROW) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 1.16% and 0.22%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Should You Buy T. Rowe (TROW) Ahead of Earnings?
text: T. Rowe (TROW) is seeing favorable earnings estimate revision activity and has a positive Zacks Earnings ESP heading into earnings season.

title: Why Is T. Rowe Price's Dividend Yield So High?
text: This asset manager's yield spiked because of a weak market, which is just the normal state of affairs.

title: The 7 Best Income Stocks to Buy in January
text: Following a volatile year, investors may want to consider the best income stocks to buy in Jan. As the name suggests, these publicly traded securities offer regular passive income payouts with dividends (typically on a quarterly basis). Fundamentally, this financial category enables market participants to have their money work for them rather than the other way around.

title: Top 10 Dividend Growth Stocks For January 2023
text: This article will focus on DGI stocks that are likely to provide a high rate of dividend growth rather than a high current yield. High-growth dividend stocks are particularly suited for folks who are in the accumulation phase and are several years away from retirement.

title: My Dividend Growth Income - Year End Summary
text: In 2022, I shifted my investment strategy to focusing on dividend growth income investing and started this article series in August '22. Dedicating myself to create monthly articles to track the progress of my investments has improved my performance and sharpened my researching abilities.

title: Dividend Income Update: December 2022
text: Dividend investing can work over time and anyone can create an ever growing passive income stream. My year over year progress is moving at a nice clip.

title: These 15 Dividend Aristocrat stocks have been the best income builders
text: The S&P Dividend Aristocrats deserve more coverage.

title: 7 Must-Buy Value Stocks for Your January Buy List
text: Fundamentally, the narrative for value stocks to buy in Jan. (or any other month) sells itself. Even the wealthiest among us find great deals attractive.

title: Dividend Income Summary: Lanny's December 2022 Summary
text: A decade of investing is snowballing on its own, but we keep investing as much as we can. In December, we (my wife and I) received a dividend income total of $8,110.03.

title: 5 Dividend Aristocrat Buys For January
text: "Dividend Aristocrats. in the S&P 500 Index have raised their annual payouts every year for at least 25 consecutive years. "--Kiplinger.com/Investing. 65 Aristocrats screened as of January 3, 2022 represented all eleven Morningstar Sectors. Broker estimated-top-ten net-gains ranged 13.23%-26.61% topped by VFC & TGT.
